notes: ZSX_Garages garage-list fix: ZSX only lists vehicles whose model exists in its own shared/config_vehicles.lua, so custom/addon cars sold by the dealership parked fine but never showed in the garage list (regardless of cash or finance). The dealership catalog is now mirrored into that file automatically - entries are appended between marker comments, ZSX's own list is never touched, and models removed from the catalog later are kept so already-sold cars stay visible. Syncs on boot and after admin add/edit/import; the console prints a reminder to restart ZSX_Garages after a sync. Opt out with Config.Garage.SyncZSXVehicleList = false.
